name: JoggAI OpenAPI v2
description:
JoggAI OpenAPI v2 provides a comprehensive suite of endpoints for creating and managing AI-powered video content.

## Authentication
All API requests require authentication using an API key provided in the `x-api-key` header.

## Base URL
Production: https://api.jogg.ai/v2

## Rate Limiting
API calls are subject to rate limiting based on your subscription plan.

## Error Handling
All endpoints return standard HTTP status codes along with detailed error messages in the response body.
